creator: mb@imp.ch
text:
Add first version of this port. The userinstall has been very
very unstable and segfaults all the time. I've rewritten it in
the Makefile.

There is also a bug in soffice.bin that makes staroffice
write configfiles to $PREFIX instead of the users directory.

I'll add adabas-support later.

CD-ROM support will be added when it's available.

A repo-copy from editors/staroffice52 to editors/staroffice60 is needed.

editors/staroffice5 can be deleted (I think)
